title: Support HEALTHCHECK
body: Handle healthcheck configuration that imagebuilder picks up, and add CLI flags to `buildah config` that allow the values to be set on the command line.  We should replace the last commit with one that goes back to upstream imagebuilder after https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/94 or an equivalent is merged.
